title: NFL's Browns Said to Sell Stake at Valuation Over $9B
title_cn: NFL 布朗队据说将以超过 $9B 的估值出售股份
summary: Bloomberg's Randall Williams joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." The Cleveland Browns said it sold a stake to Arctos Partners. The total investment is said to be for 10% of the club at a valuation of more than $9 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NFL's Commanders, Raiders Shift Ownership Stakes
title_cn: NFL 指挥官、突袭者转移所有权
summary: Doug Ostrover, the billionaire co-founder of Blue Owl Capital is unloading his stake in the NFL’s Washington Commanders. Also, Tech billionaire Michael Dell and Hollywood superagent Ari Emanuel are among a group of investors purchasing a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders football team. Scarlet Fu reports on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks, Bonds Climb as Oil Falls on US-Iran Hopes: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美国和伊朗的希望导致油价下跌，股市和债券上涨：市场结束
summary: A slide in oil prices on hopes for a deal to end the war in Iran lifted stocks and bonds, with traders also awaiting Nvidia Corp.’s results for clues on whether a tech-led surge from 2026 lows has more room to run.

title: Germany Coalition Set to Pursue 40% Stake in Tank-Maker KNDS
title_cn: 德国联盟将收购坦克制造商 KNDS 40% 的股份
summary: Germany’s ruling coalition decided to take a 40% stake in KNDS NV before the tankmaker’s planned initial public offering this summer, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Carney Pitches Reluctant British Columbia on New Oil Pipeline to Fuel Asia
title_cn: 卡尼表示不列颠哥伦比亚省不愿修建新石油管道为亚洲提供燃料
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said people in British Columbia should see “substantial economic and financial benefits” from a proposed new oil pipeline to the province’s coast, which BC Premier David Eby opposes.

title: Minutes Show Fed Officials Warned of Possible Rate Hike
title_cn: 会议纪要显示美联储官员警告可能加息
summary: A majority of Federal Reserve officials warned the central bank would likely need to consider raising interest rates if inflation continued to run persistently above their 2% target, minutes of the April 28-29 Federal Open Market Committee meeting showed. Mike McKee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Minutes Show More Officials Warned of Rate-Hike Scenario
title_cn: 美联储会议纪要显示更多官员对加息情景发出警告
summary: A majority of Federal Reserve officials warned the central bank would likely need to consider raising interest rates if inflation continued to run persistently above their 2% target.

title: Nvidia Earnings Are Set to Make or Break the Chip Stock Rally
title_cn: 英伟达的盈利将决定芯片股涨势的成败
summary: For much of the year, chip stocks have been powering the market higher. Now, Nvidia Corp.’s earnings have a chance to confirm that the rally has more room to run — or add another brick to investors’ wall of worry.

title: US Treasuries Jump as Trump Cites ‘Final Stages’ With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称与伊朗的“最后阶段”为美国国债上涨
summary: Treasuries surged on investor optimism that the US and Iran were nearing a deal that could ease a rise in global energy prices that has fanned fears around inflation.

title: US Economy Is a 'Levered Bet on AI,' Orszag Says
title_cn: 奥尔萨格表示，美国经济是“人工智能的杠杆赌注”
summary: Peter Orszag, CEO of Lazard, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." He says the US economy is now a heavy bet on the success of artificial intelligence. He also talks about how Lazard advised on NextEra Energy buying Dominion Energy for $67 billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging-Market Assets Rebound Amid Optimism Over Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争乐观情绪带动新兴市场资产反弹
summary: Emerging-market currencies extended an earlier rebound while stocks erased a decline, as oil prices tumbled on optimism over the outlook for the conflict in the Middle East.

title: EU Expedites Start of US Trade Deal in Bow to Trump Demand
title_cn: 欧盟应特朗普要求加快启动美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union finalized the text of its long-delayed US trade deal after months of negotiations, clearing a major hurdle to ratifying the pact before President Donald Trump’s threatened deadline to impose higher tariffs.

title: Neil Dutta on How Economists Are Missing the Macro Impact of AI
title_cn: 尼尔·杜塔 (Neil Dutta) 谈经济学家如何忽视人工智能的宏观影响

summary: Gold advanced as optimism surrounding US-Iran efforts to end the Middle East conflict eased bets on higher interest rates for longer.

title: Target Tempers Expectations After Best Sales Gain in Years
title_cn: 塔吉特在实现多年来最好的销售增长后调整了预期
summary:
Target Corp.’s turnaround gained traction last quarter, but the retailer worried investors after striking a more cautious tone about the coming months. The company that has been struggling to revive growth after a pandemic-fueled boom showed Wednesday that it’s making progress. Comparable sales jumped 5.6% last quarter, the biggest increase since the end of 2021 and triple the gain analysts were expecting. The chain also raised its annual revenue guidance by 2 percentage points to about 4%.

Target is looking to win back increasingly selective shoppers amid resurgent concerns about inflation as the conflict in the Middle East boosts gas prices. Competitors such as Walmart Inc. and Costco Wholesale Corp. have been gaining market share with low prices, increased online options and expanded selections.

For more on Target's results, we speak with Jennifer Bartashus, Senior Retail Staples Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crop Giant Cargill Names Giordano as World-Trading Head
title_cn: 农作物巨头嘉吉任命佐丹奴为世界贸易负责人
summary: Agricultural firm Cargill Inc. appointed Armando Giordano as its new head of world trading, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/20/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 20 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Climb as Oil Prices Decline on Iran Deal Hopes
title_cn: 伊朗协议希望导致油价下跌，欧洲股市上涨
summary: European equities rose for a third day after a report of talks between the US and Iran boosted hopes that the Middle East conflict will be resolved soon.

title: India Gets Rainfall Hedge as El Niño Threatens Monsoon
title_cn: 印度采取降雨对冲措施应对厄尔尼诺现象威胁季风
summary: India’s largest agricultural exchange has introduced its first weather derivatives, allowing investors to hedge against monsoon-related risks.

title: Bitcoin Grows More Dependent on Michael Saylor’s Buying Machine
title_cn: 比特币越来越依赖迈克尔·塞勒的购买机器
summary: For most of its history, Bitcoin’s price was driven by a sprawling cast of buyers: idealists, speculators, early adopters, and, more recently, institutional investors looking for a new portfolio hedge. Demand was fragmented and hard to predict. In 2026, it is neither.

title: Vitol Overtakes Shell in Ranking of US Physical Gas Traders
title_cn: 维多在美国实物天然气交易商排名中超越壳牌
summary: Vitol Group, the world’s largest commodity trading house, boosted trading in the US physical natural gas last year by more than all but one of its top rivals amid booming demand for the fuel.

title: A 220% Bond Rally Snaps as Venezuela Euphoria Gets Reality Check
title_cn: 委内瑞拉的欣快感得到现实检验，220%的债券上涨突然停止
summary: To the investors who had snapped up Venezuela’s defaulted bonds at beaten-down prices, it was the moment they were waiting for: Acting President Delcy Rodriguez’s government announced that it was moving quickly to kick off negotiations aimed at restructuring its $170 billion pile of debt.

title: Putin Leaves Beijing With Little Progress on Key Gas Pipeline
title_cn: 普京离开北京，关键天然气管道进展甚微
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin left Beijing with no sign of a breakthrough on a natural gas pipeline project with the potential to reshape global energy flows and geopolitics.

title: US Crude Inventories Drop by Most on Record as Exports Surge
title_cn: 随着出口激增，美国原油库存降幅创历史新高
summary: US crude inventories, including strategic reserves, plunged by a record as soaring exports start to erode domestic supply cushions.

title: Evercore's Kiely, Morgan Stanley's Cheng Talk AI Deals
title_cn: Evercore 的 Kiely 与摩根士丹利的 Cheng Talk AI 交易
summary: Tammy Kiely, senior managing director in technology investment banking at Evercore Inc., and Wally Cheng, Morgan Stanley's head of global technology M&A, discuss the outlook for dealmaking in the artificial intelligence sector. They speak with Dani Burger on ``Bloomberg Deals.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pipeline of Larger Deals Increasing: EQT's Salata
title_cn: 大型交易不断增加：EQT 的 Salata
summary: Jean Salata, chair of EQT Group, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." EQT manages around $310 billion in assets. EQT this week won the mandate to manage a new EU fund for investing in quantum computing, artificial intelligence and other deep tech companies. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley Dealmaker Sees ‘Full Spectrum’ of M&A Ahead in AI
title_cn: 摩根士丹利交易撮合者认为人工智能领域的并购前景“全方位”
summary: Morgan Stanley’s head of global technology M&A said acquisitions in artificial intelligence are coming in all sizes and in multiple industries as companies race to fill technology gaps across chips, power, networking and infrastructure.

title: NFL Ownership Moves, AI Infrastructure & Scaling Demand | Bloomberg Deals 5/20/2026
title_cn: NFL 所有权变动、人工智能基础设施和扩展需求 |彭博社优惠 2026 年 5 月 20 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: EQT Group Chair Jean Salata, Evercore Senior Managing Director Tech Investment Banking Tammy Kiely, Morgan Stanley Head of Global Technology M&A Wally Cheng, and Lazard CEO Peter Orszag. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Possible OpenAI IPO Filing in Coming Weeks
title_cn: OpenAI 可能在未来几周内提交 IPO 文件
summary: Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu discuss how OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming weeks and is targeting a public debut sometime in the fall, according to a person familiar with the plan on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Preparing to File for IPO in Coming Weeks
title_cn: OpenAI 准备在未来几周内申请 IPO
summary: OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming weeks and is targeting a public debut sometime in the fall. The exact timing remains uncertain. The ChatGPT creator, co-founded by Sam Altman, is one of the world's most valuable and powerful AI companies. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow has all the details.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russian Hackers Who Breached SolarWinds Had Deep Access to Treasury Emails
title_cn: 入侵 SolarWinds 的俄罗斯黑客可以深入访问财政部电子邮件
summary: New details about the 2020 incident.

title: Surf Air, SpaceX, xAI Staffers Line Up SPAC for Space Assets
title_cn: Surf Air、SpaceX、xAI 员工为太空资产组建 SPAC
summary: A group of aviation and telecommunication experts, including former staffers from Surf Air Mobility, xAI, and SpaceX, are forming a blank check company that will seek to take a space company public, as Wall Street chases the industry.

title: Elon Musk Will Appeal His Loss to OpenAI's Sam Altman
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 将向 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 上诉
summary: A jury rejected Elon Musk’s claims that OpenAI under Sam Altman’s leadership betrayed its mission to benefit the public by morphing into a for-profit business, finding that he waited too long to sue the company. In a post on X this week, Musk said that he will be filing an appeal with the Ninth Circuit court, noting “the judge and jury never actually ruled on the merits” of the case. For a closer look, we speak with Matthew Schettenhelm, media litigation analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kyndryl Opening Remarks
title_cn: Kyndryl 开幕致辞
summary: Kurt Anderson, Senior Vice President, Strategy & Business Development, Kyndryl U.S. kicks off the Building an AI Future-Ready Business event in New York by discussing new ways to enable continuous enterprise transformation and a competitive edge with AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Race to Offer Compute Futures to Masses Has Already Started
title_cn: 向大众提供计算未来的竞赛已经开始
summary: Wall Street is racing to turn computing power into a tradable commodity with the first ETFs being filed even before the futures contracts they would track have started to trade.

title: Nvidia Earnings in Focus as SpaceX IPO Buzz Builds | Open Interest 5/20/2026
title_cn: 随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股的热议，英伟达的盈利成为焦点未平仓合约 2026 年 5 月 20 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Nvidia earnings could determine whether the chip rally still has room to run, or reignite fears of a bubble. Goldman Sachs may take the leading role in SpaceX's mega IPO. Target tempers expectations after posting its biggest sales gain in four years. HSBC Chief Multi Asset Strategist Max Kettner, Citi US Equity Strategist Scott Chronert, FTSE Russell Head of Global Investment Research Indrani De and Goldman Sachs Semiconductor Research Analyst Jim Schneider discuss market expectations ahead of Nvidia’s highly anticipated results. Plus, Hasbro CEO Chris Cocks responds to investor concerns about the company’s exposure to petroleum-intensive products, saying the impact remains relatively limited. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung Reaches 11th-Hour Deal With Union to Avoid Strike
title_cn: 三星与工会达成避免罢工的 11 小时协议
summary: In a last-minute reversal, Samsung Electronics Co. reached a tentative deal with its labor union, averting a potentially crippling strike that had been scheduled to start Thursday at the world’s largest memory chipmaker.

title: Airbnb Pushes Beyond Stays With Luggage Storage, Car Rentals, Hotels
title_cn: Airbnb 超越住宿范畴，提供行李寄存、汽车租赁、酒店服务
summary: Airbnb Inc. will let guests arrange luggage storage, airport pickups and car and equipment rentals, its latest effort to expand beyond short-term rentals.

title: Airbnb’s Chesky Says US ‘Misunderstanding’ Use of Chinese Open-Source AI Models
title_cn: Airbnb 的切斯基称美国“误解”了中国开源人工智能模型的使用
summary: Airbnb Inc. Chief Executive Officer Brian Chesky defended his company’s use of Chinese artificial intelligence models, saying US lawmakers who worry Chinese firms can access Americans’ user data are “misunderstanding” the technology.

title: AI Rally Losing Breadth, Says FTSE Russell’s De
title_cn: 富时罗素 (FTSE Russell) 的 De 表示，人工智能涨势正在失去广度
summary: FTSE Russell Head of Global Investment Research Indrani De says the AI-fueled rally in equities is running out of breadth. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Faces High Bar to Sustain AI Rally
title_cn: 英伟达面临维持人工智能反弹的高门槛
summary: Nvidia faces a high bar as it looks to keep the AI rally going. Goldman Sachs Semiconductor Research Analyst Jim Schneider discusses expectations ahead of the chipmaker's highly anticipated results on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Adds Pressure to Warsh’s Bond-Market Bind
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣给沃什的债券市场束缚增加了压力
summary:
With Kevin Warsh set to take office on Friday and the war-driven price shock sending bond yields higher, analysts say a widely-used indicator is suggesting AI is worsening the Fed's inflation problem. 
James Egelhof, Chief US Economist at BNP Paribas, discusses the Fed's rate path, inflation pressures, and how AI ties into the mix. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Begins 8,000 Global Job Cuts in AI Efficiency Push
title_cn: Meta 开始在全球范围内裁员 8,000 人以推动人工智能效率
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is alerting thousands of employees that they’re being laid off, part of a previously announced restructuring aimed at reducing costs while the company invests heavily in artificial intelligence.

title: US Treasury Sanctions Drug Traffickers For Laundering Profits via Crypto
title_cn: 美国财政部制裁通过加密货币洗钱的毒贩
summary: The US Treasury Department announced sanctions against an operative for the Sinaloa Cartel who it says uses cryptocurrency to funnel drug-trafficking proceeds back into Mexico.

title: What if Big Tech’s Massive Bet on AI Is a False Start?
title_cn: 如果大型科技公司对人工智能的大规模押注是一个错误的开始怎么办？
summary:
Big tech is spending hundreds of billions on AI. Is it money well spent?

Merryn Somerset Webb explains why it could be a colossal false start.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hasbro CEO on Oil Costs, Video Games and New Projects
title_cn: 孩之宝首席执行官谈石油成本、视频游戏和新项目
summary: Hasbro CEO Chris Cocks addresses investor concerns regarding the company's exposure to petroleum-intensive products, clarifying that such exposure is relatively light. He emphasizes that the majority of Hasbro's business and growth comes from games as well as licensing and digital products. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The AI Boom Is Making Warsh’s Bond-Market Bind Even Worse
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣让 Warsh 的债券市场束缚变得更糟
summary: To judge by a key bond-market signal, the AI boom is only worsening Kevin Warsh’s inflation problem.

title: SpaceX Expected to Make IPO Filing Public Today
title_cn: SpaceX 预计将于今天公开 IPO 文件
summary: SpaceX is expected to file paperwork for its massive initial public offering today. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are the leading banks. The target valuation is now above $2 trillion. Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz has more on what to expect. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What to Watch for In Nvidia Earnings After the Bell
title_cn: 英伟达盘后收益值得关注
summary: Nvidia, the world's most valuable company, reports first-quarter earnings after the bell on Wednesday. Wall Street is waiting to get a read on the state of the artificial intelligence economy. Investors will also look for guidance on its long-term sales forecast and trying to sell AI processors in China. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Liontrust Focused on Nvidia Suppliers Ahead of Earnings
title_cn: Liontrust 在盈利前重点关注 Nvidia 供应商
summary: Clare Pleydell-Bouverie, Liontrust Fund manager, talks about why she is focused on what Nvidia is buying from suppliers ahead of their earnings report. She speaks on "Bloomberg The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Commerzbank CEO Says AI Will Cut €350 Million in Costs by 2030
title_cn: 德国商业银行首席执行官表示，到 2030 年，人工智能将削减 3.5 亿欧元的成本
summary: Commerzbank AG Chief Executive Officer Bettina Orlopp said artificial intelligence will lead to cost savings worth about €350 million ($406 million) in a few years.

title: Trump Downplays Need for More Cuba Pressure After Castro Charge
title_cn: 卡斯特罗指控后，特朗普淡化了对古巴施加更多压力的必要性
summary: President Donald Trump played down the need to further ratchet up pressure on the Cuban government after the US charged the country’s former president, Raúl Castro, with murder.

title: There's a 'Judgment Day Coming' For Our Country Says Andrew Young
title_cn: 安德鲁·杨说，我们国家的“审判日即将到来”
summary: Andrew Young, former US UN ambassador and civil rights activist, joined Balance of Power to discuss the election results in Georgia and the current political climate. Young said whether it's the midterms this year or the 2028 election, voters are going to deliver a judgment on the current direction of the country. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Charges Cuba’s Raúl Castro With Murder in 1996 Shootdown
title_cn: 美国指控古巴劳尔·卡斯特罗在 1996 年击落事件中谋杀
summary: The US charged former Cuban President Raúl Castro with murder, sharply escalating a standoff with Havana as the Trump administration attempts to force change on the island after nearly seven decades of communist rule.

title: Iran Threatens to Retaliate Beyond Middle East If US Attacks
title_cn: 如果美国发动袭击，伊朗威胁将在中东以外地区进行报复
summary: Iran warned it would retaliate beyond the Middle East if the US or Israel attacks it again, following renewed threats from President Donald Trump. Rachel Whitlark, Georgia Tech Sam Nunn School of International Affairs Associate Professor joins Balance of Power to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Orban’s Return to Power Set to Be Ruled Out by New Term Limits
title_cn: 新任期限制将排除欧尔班重返权力的可能
summary: Hungary’s ruling party introduced a constitutional amendment limiting prime ministerial terms to eight years, effectively barring previous incumbent Viktor Orban from ever returning to the position.

title: Chile's Big Economic Bill Clears Another Hurdle as Kast Seeks to Drive Growth
title_cn: 卡斯特寻求推动增长，智利的庞大经济法案扫清了另一个障碍
summary: Chile’s lower house of Congress approved President José Antonio Kast’s flagship economic bill that his administration is counting on to drive growth in one of Latin America’s richest nations.

title: KKR Consortium Warns White House of ‘Bias’ in $10 Billion Argentina Auction
title_cn: KKR 财团警告白宫在 100 亿美元的阿根廷拍卖中存在“偏见”
summary: A consortium of dredging companies backed by KKR & Co. complained to the White House of unfair conditions in bidding for a pivotal contract in Argentina, calling on the US for “timely engagement.”

title: Trump Flexes Grip Over GOP During Primary Night
title_cn: 特朗普在初选之夜对共和党施压
summary: President Trump and the candidates he endorsed in the congressional primary had a good night on Tuesday. But, as Tyler Kendall asks, will it be enough to keep control of the House and Senate come November? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Charges Former Cuban Leader Raúl Castro With Murder
title_cn: 美国指控古巴前领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗谋杀
summary: Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche made the announcement Wednesday in Miami. The charges stem from the downing of two civilian aircraft in 1996. They were operated by a Florida-based exile group called Brothers to the Rescue. Bloomberg's Myles Miller reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will Democrats Flip the Senate This Fall?
title_cn: 民主党今年秋天会推翻参议院吗？
summary: Democrats have a shot at flipping the Senate in the midterms this fall. But it won’t be easy, says Bloomberg Opinion columnist David M. Drucker. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jeff Bezos Says New York City Second-Home Tax Is ‘Fine’ Idea
title_cn: 杰夫·贝索斯表示纽约市第二居所税是“好”主意
summary: Amazon.com Inc. founder Jeff Bezos expressed support for New York’s plan to impose a new tax on luxury second homes in the city, noting that higher levies on out-of-towners is a reasonable way to raise revenue.

title: US Marines Board and Release Another Iran-Flagged Tanker
title_cn: 美国海军陆战队登上并释放另一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的油轮
summary: The US military boarded and later released an Iranian-flagged oil tanker in the Gulf of Oman, keeping up pressure on Tehran’s economy as President Donald Trump presses for a deal to end their conflict.

title: Housing Affordability Bill Advances After Provision Scrapped
title_cn: 住房负担能力法案在取消条款后推进
summary: The most sweeping housing legislation in a generation advanced in Congress after a contentious provision was removed and the White House offered its endorsement, sending the bill back to the Senate.

title: Trump Flexes Grip Over GOP With Massie’s Defeat in Kentucky
title_cn: 特朗普因马西在肯塔基州的失败而对共和党施以控制
summary: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for a congressional seat in Northern Kentucky, Ed Gallrein, defeated the president’s nemesis and longtime GOP House member Thomas Massie in one of the most expensive primaries on record.

title: EU Countries Summon Israeli Ambassadors Over Activist Treatment
title_cn: 欧盟国家就激进分子待遇召见以色列大使
summary: Belgium, the Netherlands and Italy summoned Israel’s ambassadors over the treatment of activists detained by Israel after seeking to breach its naval blockade of Gaza in a flotilla.

title: Democrats to Target DOJ’s New Weaponization Fund in Budget Vote
title_cn: 民主党人将在预算投票中针对司法部的新武器化基金
summary: Democrats plan to put Republicans on the record on the Trump administration’s new $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization fund” during a politically charged vote series this week.

title: Extortion Crackdown in Mexico Nabs Local Mayor, Other Officials
title_cn: 墨西哥打击敲诈勒索行动导致当地市长和其他官员被捕
summary: Mexican security officials arrested four local officials, including the mayor of a town just south of the capital, part of a wider operation to combat rampant extortion rackets.

title: Trump Says Would Talk to Taiwan Leader as He Mulls Arms Sale
title_cn: 特朗普称将与台湾领导人讨论军售事宜
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would speak to Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te as his administration considers whether to move ahead with a $14 billion weapons sale to the self-ruling island — a potential arms deal that has drawn criticism from China.

title: US Wants Ukraine to Help Ease Restrictions on Belarus Potash
title_cn: 美国希望乌克兰帮助放宽对白俄罗斯钾肥的限制
summary: The US is pushing Ukraine to ease restrictions on imports of potash fertilizers from Belarus and has asked Kyiv to make the case with European nations to do so as well, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: UK to Delay Hike in Motor Fuel Tax to Show Action on Prices
title_cn: 英国将推迟提高汽车燃油税以对价格采取行动
summary: The UK will delay a planned hike in motor fuel duty in a bid to ease the pressure on drivers since the war in Iran erupted.

title: Trump Says He's in No Hurry to Reach Deal With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称他不急于与伊朗达成协议
summary: President Donald Trump says he's in "no hurry" to reach a deal with Iran to end the war. Trump says it seems like Iran does not have the "good of the people" in mind. He spoke to reporters on Wednesday.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi and Putin Wrap Talks Showcasing Ties Amid Global Unrest
title_cn: 习近平和普京结束会谈展示全球动荡中的关系
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin left Beijing after a day of talks with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, with the two leaders seeking to underscore the strength of their relations amid global tensions over wars in Ukraine and Iran.

title: Canada to Spend C$1.1 Billion Hosting Its 13 FIFA World Cup Games
title_cn: 加拿大将斥资11亿加元主办第13届世界杯
summary: Canadian taxpayers will spend just under C$1.1 billion ($801 million) to host their country’s portion of this summer’s FIFA World Cup, a report said Wednesday, adding to the growing public bill across North America from the event.

title: Trump Will Speak to Taiwan's Leader About an Arms Deal
title_cn: 特朗普将与台湾领导人讨论军火交易
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would speak to Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te as his administration considers a $14 billion weapons sale to Taiwan. Trump spoke to reporters on Wednesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Threatens to Retaliate Beyond Middle East If US Attacks
title_cn: 如果美国发动袭击，伊朗威胁将在中东以外地区进行报复
summary: Iran warned it would retaliate beyond the Middle East if the US or Israel attacks it again, following renewed threats from President Donald Trump.
